emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Cheryl: You may want to mention to Anna (Bear) that ENA would like to transfer the Securities Loan Agreement to Enron Credit Inc., retrieve the ENE guaranty for ENA and have Enron Credit Inc. guaranteed under a new ENE guaranty. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 03/22/2001 11:09 AM Sheila Glover 03/22/2001 10:59 AM

emails.body: OK, Cheryl, you thought I was kidding about needing the guaranty! Can we request the new guaranty now? emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Hi Sara and Sheila, By way of update, I was able to get the guaranty to Clem and am working on his getting it back to me by the end of the day. I talked to Bear Stearn's lawyer today about whether we could get the other agreements (account and assignment) executed today and she represented that (1) she is still waiting for her Managing Director's approval of her final draft in order to forward it to me (2) but that she is working with me to check in with the MD every hour or so for a status update. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 03/27/2001 06:59 PM

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Hi Sara and Sheila, By way of update, I was able to get the guaranty to Clem and am working on his getting it back to me by the end of the day. I talked to Bear Stearn's lawyer today about whether we could get the other agreements (account and assignment) executed today and she represented that (1) she is still waiting for her Managing Director's approval of her final draft in order to forward it to me (2) but that she is working with me to check in with the MD every hour or so for a status update. emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter Sara, I am on hold on a conference call but wanted to talk with you about some questions/issues re: the assignment agreement. (My questions are not holding us up since Anna is proceeding to try to get a final draft as we know it executed). But for my own understanding: 1. Is ENA assigning to Enron Credit Inc. any agreements other than the Securities Loan Agreement? If so, let me know. If not, then would we need an assignment agreement as opposed to just having Enron Credit Inc. sign a Securities Loan Agreement? Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter Sara, I am on hold on a conference call but wanted to talk with you about some questions/issues re: the assignment agreement. (My questions are not holding us up since Anna is proceeding to try to get a final draft as we know it executed). But for my own understanding: 1. Is ENA assigning to Enron Credit Inc. any agreements other than the Securities Loan Agreement? If so, let me know. If not, then would we need an assignment agreement as opposed to just having Enron Credit Inc. sign a Securities Loan Agreement? Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: (1) The only agreement that ENA is assigning is the Securities Loan Agreement. (2) Remember, ENA is also assigning the "credit book" (identified in Sheila's earlier email and more clearly identified in Tom Doukas' email of yesterday which I forwarded to ;you yesterday). Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 03/28/2001 10:11 AM

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Sheila and Tom need to know the status. Please advise them mid-day. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 03/28/2001 10:04 AM

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: I see so, in another words the "credit book" consists of or is considered "obligations" etc. but there are no other agreements. Thanx for reiterating. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 03/28/2001 10:20 AM

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Hello Team, I have good news. Clem Abrams approved the guaranty and will have it executed first thing tomorrow. (None of the requisite officers are in today). I am still contacting Bear Stearns every couple of hours to get the final drafts of the agreements in our hands. I'll keep you posted. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 03/28/2001 10:21 AM

emails.subject: Re: BEAR Guarantee letter
emails.body: Sara, I confirmed with Mike Bruegel that he will be opening the account for us and has understood this since Tom Doukas and I addressed this issue yesterday. I will edit your lotus notes entry to reflect this correction. Also, he asked me whether I knew what documents have to accompany the agreement. I told him yes, since I do this all the time. I have in my electronic file folder the blank account form and tax form. If you would like for me to send electronic copes to you if you do not have copies then let me know. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Forwarded by Cheryl Nelson/NA/Enron on 03/30/2001 04:13 PM Tom Doukas 03/29/2001 03:46 PM
